aptitude_questions.question: If A can complete a task in 12 days and B in 16 days, how long will they take together?
A can do a work in 10 days. He works for 4 days and leaves. B finishes the remaining work in 6 days. How long would B take alone?
A, B, and C can do a job in 6, 8, and 12 days respectively. They work together for 2 days. Remaining work is done by A and B. In how many days?
A is twice as efficient as B. They complete a work together in 12 days. How long would B alone take?
A and B can do a work in 15 days and 20 days respectively. They work on alternate days, starting with A. How long will the work last?
A alone can do a work in 20 days. B alone can do it in 30 days. If they start together, after 4 days, how much work is left?
5 men can complete a work in 12 days. How long will 8 men take?
A works on a job for 6 days and completes 2/5 of it. In how many days can he finish the whole job?
Two taps can fill a tank in 12 and 16 hours. A leak empties it in 24 hours. Tank is full. How long to fill the tank with taps open?
A can do 1/3 of work in 5 days. B can do the remaining work in 8 days. How long would they take together?
A train runs 240 km in 4 hours. Speed?
A can cover 180 km in 3 hours. B can cover 240 km in 4 hours. Who is faster?
Two trains of length 100m and 150m cross each other in 10 sec. Find the sum of lengths?
A car moves at 60 km/hr for 2 hours, then 80 km/hr for 3 hours. Avg speed?
A train takes 2 hours less than a car to cover same distance 240 km. Train speed 80 km/hr. Car speed?
Find next in series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
If all Bloops are Razzies and all Razzies are Lazzies, are all Bloops definitely Lazzies?
If today is Tuesday, what day will it be 45 days later?
Average marks of students (78, 65, 82, 56, 90)?
Highest marks?
Units for B if total = 200 and B = 35%?
